title: Rent Payment Assistance * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Rent Payment Assistance * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Older Adults Native American Community Agricultural Laborers AIDS/HIV Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE RENTAL SUPPORT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides one month rent assistance within a 24 month period. 9615 Grand Ronde Road Grand Ronde, OR 97347 Eligibility: -Members of the Confederated Tribes of Grand Ronde who are experiencing homelessness or with a current eviction notice -Household income is within 60% of Median Income Guidelines -Must have sustainable income to cover rent on a monthly basis after assistance is provided Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 879-2034 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS GOVERNMENT OFFICE EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides transitional housing rental assistance or a rental deposit, which may include placement in community-based crisis centers, transitional housing, or motels, or payment of one month of rent or a deposit toward a new rental unit. Assistance is based on funding availability and is not guaranteed. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe, and families that are experiencing homelessness. Homelessness that was not caused by eviction for drug or alcohol issues, criminal activity, or any other reason due to the fault of the family, excluding non-payment of rent. Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-1310 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS GOVERNMENT OFFICE RENTAL ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rent assistance. Assistance is based on available funding and is not guaranteed. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe and low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF GRAND RONDE RENTAL SUPPORT PROGRAM CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS EMERGENCY ASSISTANCE/HOMELESS PREVENTION
